name: primordialencounters
description: A comprehensive simulation and analysis framework for detecting primordial black hole (PBH) flybys through Solar System ephemerides. This repository implements N-body simulations, analytic impulse approximations, ensemble detection rate estimates, and parameter recovery techniques to replicate and extend the methods detailed in "Close Encounters of the Primordial Kind" (arXiv:2312.17217v3).
author: ImmortalDemonGod
